So the first thing we do, like I said earlier, and I'm just going to take a deeper dive for you, is we send a quick sequence. And that's usually three days of emails. ## [03:03 - 06:04]

but most of your clickers will not buy from this. And that's normal. We expect that to happen. And it's normal for two reasons. Number one is they might not all watch it because it's really front loaded with a lot of education. And number two, most rational people just don't immediately buy stuff, right? So that kind of makes pretty good sense there. So the folks who click this video here, so they've opened the email, they click the link in this email, they go here. If they don't buy, then we put them in another email sequence. And this email sequence is called a countdown sequence. And this is typically four days, three days, however long you want to do it, it is up to you. And the difference is, instead of pointing them back to this educational VSL, we're sending them to the other webpage. This is the one that has the non-educational VSL here. And it does not have the delayed buy button. And we put a countdown timer at the top. And the reason why is because these emails basically say, hey, I noticed you just checked out my video.
